The company's online book subscription service include curated of read-to-me, audio books and educational videos, enabling children aged 12 and under to instantly discover contents of their interest, read them and share with friends.

name: Khush
description: Developer of music applications for mobile phones. The company's application analyzes the user's voice and composes music to match.

name: SafeShepherd
description: Provider of services for people to protect their privacy. The company's website enables users to see, remove and protect their personal information from the Internet.

name: Juxta Labs
description: Provider of social gaming applications designed to offer messaging platform. The company's social gaming applications such as Yearbook and WordTag to merge real life relationships and activities for social experiences, enabling users to bring fun to life.
